title: Bundled Delight
description: Bundled Delight is a mod that aims to add features connecting Farmer's Delight Add-Ons such as Brewin' & Chewin', Farmer's Respite and Miner's Delight!
body: Bundled Delight is a mod that aims to add features connecting Farmer's Delight Add-Ons such as Brewin' & Chewin', Farmer's Respite and Miner's Delight! Feel free to suggest some features or addons this should integrate! This mod's main additions require you to install any of the following to load their respective features: ### Brewin' & Chewin': Cheeseburgers. ### Farmer's Respite: Crushed Tea Leaves and Storage blocks for Tea & Coffee ### Miner's Delight: Copper Mugs (Farmer's Respite) Copper Tankards (Brewin' & Chewin') Radiant Brew (Brewin' & Chewin' & Milkyway Core(for recipe)) ### Base Features: Borscht. Nettle Soup.
